subject: [PATCH v5 07/18] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE accessors to uffd

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch renames kernel-internal functions and variables related to the uffd-wp PTE bit, which is reused for marking access-tracking PTEs in addition to write protection. The renaming is mechanical and does not change behavior. The changes affect various architecture-specific files as well as core mm code. The goal of this patch is to simplify the kernel's handling of userfaultfd by making its internal names consistent with its new usage.
